CookieBanner.title: We use cookies
CookieBanner.description: This site uses essential cookies for operation. Analytics cookies are only activated after your consent.

DSAR.title: Privacy & Data
DSAR.exportDesc: Download a copy of all your personal data in JSON format
DSAR.deleteDesc: Submit a request to delete all your personal data. The request will be sent for approval by the conservatorium administrator.
DSAR.withdrawDesc: Withdrawing consent to data processing may limit your ability to use the platform.
DSAR.exportSuccess: Your data will be sent to your email address within 30 days.
DSAR.deleteSuccess: Your deletion request has been received and will be processed within 30 days.
DSAR.withdrawSuccess: Consent withdrawn. Access to some parts of the platform may be restricted.
